StructurePhase.Reference: Savitskii E.M., Tylkina M.A., Tsyganova I.A., Sov. At. Energy, v7 p724 (1959)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 458094. Melting Point: 2133 K. Polymorphism: Low temperature phase. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Zr. Compound Preparation: heated at 1673 K under vacuum, followed by arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Article Title: PHASE DIAGRAM OF THE ZIRCONIUM-RHENIUM SYSTEM. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: c. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
